name: puffer
description: Native liquid Ethereum restaking supercharged by EigenLayer.

name: ether.fi Stake
description: Decentralized and non-custodial Ethereum staking protocol.

name: Kelp
description: Kelp is the second largest liquid restaking protocol with ~$2B+ in TVL. Its liquid restaked token, rsETH, is live across 10+ major L2s and 40+ DeFi platforms, allowing users to restake while maintaining full liquidity.

name: mETH Protocol
description: A permissionless, non-custodial ETH liquid staking protocol deployed on Ethereum L1 and governed by Mantle.

name: Mellow Core
description: Core Vaults encode strategy constraints directly into the vault configuration. This includes which integrations can be used, which actions are permitted, and how capital can move between execution paths. Enforcement happens onchain, making strategy behavior inspectable and resistant to off-policy execution.

name: Renzo
description: Renzo is an institutional-grade onchain platform for staking, restaking, and capital deployment, offering transparent, secure access to advanced yield strategies through modular products: Reserve Vaults, Staking Suite, and Enterprise Suite.

name: Swell L2 Farm
description: Pre-launch deposits for Swell L2, the L2 for Restaking

name: Bedrock uniETH
description: uniETH represents the staked ETH in Bedrock plus all future staking rewards. uniETH is non-rebasing, i.e. does not grow in quantity over time but grows in value instead. In other words, 1 uniETH will be worth more than 1 ETH as time goes on, and its value will continue to increase as more time passes
